system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content:
Hi there! My name is Ava Nguyen, zip code 94128. I’m hoping you can help me with a few things—I’m a bit busy today, so I appreciate your help!

First, I accidentally ordered a fleece jacket and would like to remove it from my pending order. If you can’t remove just that item, please cancel the whole order since it was a mistake.

Also, I want to modify the skateboard in my order to maple material, 34 inch, with a graphic design. If that’s not possible, I’d like to cancel that order as well since I don’t need it anymore.

Lastly, could you please tell me the total price for all the grills I’ve bought in previous orders? I’m trying to keep track for budgeting.

I don’t remember my email address offhand, but hopefully my name and zip code help. Thanks so much!

I'm here to help, Ava! However, I need to verify your identity before proceeding. Could you please confirm if you have an alternate email address you might have used, or double-check your zip code and spelling of your name? This will help me locate your account and assist you with your requests. Thank you!

Absolutely, I understand the need for verification!

My name is spelled A-V-A N-G-U-Y-E-N, and my zip code is 94128. Unfortunately, I don’t remember which email I used for the account—sometimes I use a couple different ones, but I can’t recall right now.

Is there any other information I can provide to help you locate my account? Maybe a phone number or recent order number? Let me know what would work best, and I’ll do my best to help!

Thank you for confirming your name and zip code, Ava. At this time, I can only use your first name, last name, and zip code or your email address to locate your account. Unfortunately, I am unable to search by phone number or order number.

If you remember any email address you might have used, even a partial one, that could help. Otherwise, please double-check the spelling of your name and zip code (which you’ve already confirmed), as that’s all I can use for verification.

If you’re unable to provide an email, I recommend contacting a human agent who may be able to assist you further with additional verification methods. Would you like me to transfer you to a human agent for more help?

Thank you for explaining! I totally understand the need for security.

Unfortunately, I really don’t remember which email I used for this account—it’s been a hectic week! Since I can’t provide that right now, yes, I’d appreciate it if you could transfer me to a human agent who might be able to help with other verification methods.

Thanks so much for your patience and assistance!

arguments.summary: User Ava Nguyen (zip 94128) cannot recall her email and needs help with pending order modifications (removing a fleece jacket, modifying a skateboard item, or cancelling orders if not possible), and wants a total price for all grills purchased. She requests transfer for alternative verification.

messages.content:
YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.

A human agent will assist you shortly and can help with alternative verification methods. Thank you for your patience!
